message:
refactor(connectors): extract modules, add doctor checks, and standardize lifecycle

Major connector refactoring pass across 20+ connectors:

Module extraction:
- Extract HTTP clients, config types, and error handling from connector.rs
  into dedicated client.rs, types.rs, and error.rs modules for dingtalk,
  irc, qq, and nostr connectors
- Reduces connector.rs complexity from 600-1000+ lines to focused logic

Doctor checks (V3 compliance):
- Implement structured DoctorResult with DoctorCheck items for dingtalk,
  irc, qq, nostr, and wolfram connectors
- Each check reports name, passed/failed, message, and criticality level
- Comprehensive wolfram doctor test coverage

Standard connector updates:
- Fix async→sync patterns in apple-notes, apple-reminders, bluebubbles
- Convert ok_or() to ok_or_else() for proper lazy error evaluation
- Update doc strings with backtick formatting
- Add chrono, fcp-crypto, fcp-testkit dev-dependencies for test expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
